_meta.verdicts: clean (direct, obvious) | findable (works, minor friction) | slow (works but buried/too many taps or wrong guesses) | lost (novice fails or dead-ends) | unbuilt (feature sequenced in backlog/PRD — cite) | gap (no path, not sequenced)
_meta.taps: from the scenario's natural entry; mobile bottom-nav counts as 1 per tab
_meta.note: Code-derived walkthroughs; * = worth confirming in dogfood screenshots

scenarios.path: trips list → trip → (day card with flight) → day → item; or Overview day summaries
scenarios.notes: No flights-level view; relies on knowing which day. DayCard summaries help. Related WP-A-017.

scenarios.intent: Add an idea I'm not sure about yet
scenarios.path: day → +Add / FAB → items/new (status defaults?) — or phase page ?/addIdea
scenarios.notes: *Verify items/new exposes 'unplanned/idea' status plainly to a novice; phase page addIdea is the dedicated idea-capture but phase page is a power surface.

scenarios.path: bottom-nav Members → Invite by email (or join-link copy)
scenarios.notes: Members is a top-level tab; travelers canInvite ✓; join links per-role with copy button ✓.

scenarios.intent: Say what I'm excited about (new member)
scenarios.path: Overview → SubTab Goals → capture wizard; or Phases → swipe card; or vote on day cards
scenarios.notes: All surfaces exist; none announce themselves to a fresh joiner. D1 intentional scattering; gap is the missing orientation moment (WP-A-014, WP-A-015).

scenarios.intent: FIRST FIVE MINUTES: invite link → oriented
scenarios.path: join/invite (good context card, OTP, claim) → accept → Overview, cold
scenarios.notes: Front door excellent; landing is unoriented. Charter D2; WP-A-014. Known open issue — attach.

scenarios.path: Overview → Lists sub-tab → Booking smart list
scenarios.notes: Count badge on Lists index; read-and-check ✓.

scenarios.path: item detail → Documents section → upload; or Docs tab FAB → sheet with item picker
scenarios.notes: Both scopes per PRD; clipboard paste backlog S3 (#73).

scenarios.path: Money tab → Budget sub-tab (estimated total vs budget)
Overview phase section → day card → day view (DnD timeline, parking divider, DayNav)
scenarios.notes: Day view is the app's best surface.

scenarios.path: Goals sub-tab (vote stacks) + day-view parking lot (vote stacks)
scenarios.notes: Split across two surfaces by design (goal votes vs item votes, ADR-0004).

scenarios.intent: Add restaurant options for ONE city
scenarios.path: phase page → addIdea (phase-scoped, repeats) — or items/new per item
scenarios.notes: addIdea on phase page is right surface but phase page reads as admin; items/new round-trips per idea. *No rapid multi-capture flow; goals/capture has one for goals — items don't.

scenarios.path: Overview → DayCard summaries + DayMetricToggle; or day view timeline density
scenarios.notes: Walking distance is out of scope (no maps); density/count is the available proxy.

scenarios.intent: Anything unbooked that should be booked before we go?
scenarios.path: Lists → Booking (auto list) — same as #6, novice entry
scenarios.notes: Novice must guess 'Lists' holds it; 'Needs booking' pills on cards help en route.

scenarios.intent: Add MY flight, compare with others'
scenarios.path: add flight item ✓; comparison view — none
scenarios.notes: WP-A-017. Not in backlog.

scenarios.path: items/new transportation + end_date spanning days across phases → MultiDayBanner on each spanned day
scenarios.notes: Storage supports it (ADR-0002); item still belongs to ONE phase — surfaced under that phase's parking/structure only. *Verify banner renders across phase boundary.

scenarios.path: item detail → Comments (+ notification to others)
scenarios.notes: Comment notification links back to item ✓. Messaging ceiling is intentional (SPEC_BACKLOG scope note).

scenarios.path: More → Settings → dates → save
scenarios.notes: *Dogfood: confirm day regeneration + what happens to items on removed days (trips.pb.js hook). Phase dates edited separately per phase.

scenarios.path: open trip (active → Trip Mode default) → Now
scenarios.notes: Interim layout (#153/#154) but states are correct.

scenarios.path: Docs tab → grouped by Flights → row → lightbox/file
scenarios.notes: Precached on active trips ✓. Back-button bug WP-A-003 lurks on exit.

scenarios.path: Add (center) → Add expense → expenses?action=add (form auto-opens)
scenarios.notes: Deep-link param handled ✓. Mode flips to planning chrome on landing — mild context jolt.*

scenarios.path: NONE in Trip Mode: free-time Focus links next item only; parking lot unreachable; must mode-switch → day view → parking divider → pull
scenarios.notes: WP-A-005, charter D3/D4 violation. THE seam scenario.

scenarios.path: Add → Add item to today (prefilled day+phase)
scenarios.notes: D3 today-scope honored ✓ (AddSheet:19).

scenarios.path: Today → multi-day banner (ongoing) → item detail → location
scenarios.notes: MultiDayBanner on Today ✓; maps deep-link is backlog (Integrations).

scenarios.intent: Check tomorrow's plan from Trip Mode
scenarios.path: Today → Tomorrow preview (3 items) → 'See all' → Next 3 Days sub-tab
scenarios.notes: Read-only lookahead, correct per D3 boundary.

scenarios.path: Today → checklists section at bottom → tap checkbox
scenarios.notes: Below tomorrow preview — scroll to find.*

scenarios.intent: Save today's favorite photo as a Memory
scenarios.notes: Trip Memory: PRD'd + glossaried, zero code (verified: no memory routes/components). SPEC_BACKLOG: shipped-nothing. Cite TRIP_MEMORY_PRD; not a nav finding.

scenarios.path: item detail → codes; Docs tab does NOT show codes
scenarios.taps: 2 if you guess item; lost if you guess Docs

scenarios.intent: Offline on the plane — what works?
scenarios.path: documents precache automatic ✓; page/data offline = manual toggle in More (planning nav only) + reload
mode-switch → More → Print itinerary (window.print)
scenarios.notes: WP-A-024. *Dogfood what actually prints.

scenarios.intent: How are we doing on budget, mid-trip?
scenarios.path: mode-switch → Money → Budget
scenarios.notes: WP-A-018. Add-flow exists; glance doesn't.

scenarios.path: Money → balances + Settle up button → flow
scenarios.notes: In-page excellent; the gap is nothing INVITES it post-trip (WP-A-001).

scenarios.path: More → Closeout → wizard (day-by-day, bulk, replacements)
scenarios.notes: Wizard good. Entry buried + no status gate (WP-A-007); owner-only card.

scenarios.intent: Did we do what we set out to? (goals at closeout)
scenarios.path: closeout wizard has NO goals step (grep: no goal refs); goals reviewable manually via Goals sub-tab (derived status)
scenarios.notes: CONTEXT.md says Trip Goals 'reviewed in the closeout wizard' — code disagrees. Doc-vs-code mismatch + scenario gap; V4_GROUP_INPUT_PRD check in Phase 3.
Same as #26 (TRIP_MEMORY_PRD, closeout-retro capture specced, unbuilt).

scenarios.path: More → Settings → enable archive → wait for publish → hand-copy relative path from <code>
scenarios.notes: WP-A-019 + WP-A-002 (pre-publish 404).

scenarios.intent: Start next year's trip from this one
scenarios.path: More → Clone (phase mapping + date shift)
scenarios.notes: Owner/co-owner only — travelers can't clone a trip they were on.*flag in walk

scenarios.path: More → Export (JSON download)
open app → trip silently back in planning UI; eventually 'Past' section; no prompt to settle/closeout/share
scenarios.notes: WP-A-001 (charter D5, pre-agreed P1).

scenarios.intent: Family does the trip themselves from the recap
scenarios.path: archive renders plan read-only; no template/export for non-members
scenarios.notes: WP-A-020 — needs an intentional-vs-build call.

scenarios.path: mode pill (mobile top / siderail) ↔; toggle navigates to mode home
scenarios.notes: Pill is small + label-only ('Edit plan'/'Trip view'); entry inconsistency WP-A-006. *Dogfood discoverability.

scenarios.path: back out to trips list → avatar chip → /account
scenarios.notes: WP-A-011. Note: /account edits global avatar; per-trip display_name set at claim/join has no edit surface at all.*

scenarios.intent: What changed since I last looked?
scenarios.path: NotificationBell (6 surfaces) → links to inbox/item/members
scenarios.notes: WP-A-012 placement inconsistency; badge not live (backlog).

scenarios.path: remove (owner): Members ✓ w/ tombstones. Self-leave: none
scenarios.notes: WP-A-013 (self-leave). Removal UX itself clean.

scenarios.intent: Several trips — find the right one
scenarios.path: /trips: On trip / Upcoming / Past sections, accent on active
scenarios.notes: Good orientation. Past section gives no closeout/archive status cue (minor, folds into WP-A-001).
